news.title: 11 charged in arcade burglaries in metro Atlanta inspired by social media trend
news.summary: The Gwinnett County Police Department said a series of burglaries at Urban Air Adventure locations led to the arrests of 11 people, all under the age of 21.

news.title: Man disguises himself with Amazon vest to break into cars, police say
news.summary: Sandy Springs police are warning drivers after they arrested a man accused of breaking into cars while wearing an Amazon vest.

news.title: Social media trend sparks Gwinnett adventure park burglaries
news.summary: Gwinnett County police arrested 11 teens and adults alongside four juveniles following a series of after-hours burglaries at Urban Air Adventure Park. Investigators say the break-ins were fueled by a

news.title: Atlanta man killed in SE Georgia shooting, GBI investigating
news.summary: A 36-year-old Atlanta man was killed in a Fourth of July shooting in southeast Georgia, and the investigation has been turned over to the Georgia Bureau of Investigation.

news.title: Man found dead in street Tuesday morning, Atlanta PD investigating
news.summary: Atlanta police are investigating after a man was found dead in the street early Tuesday morning.

news.title: Woman dies at hospital after shooting, Atlanta police investigating
news.summary: A shooting turned fatal after a wounded woman was driven to an Atlanta hospital in a private vehicle and died from their injuries, police said.

news.title: 1 dead in shooting at apartment complex in Atlanta's Browns Mill Park neighborhood, police say
news.summary: Investigators have not released the victim's identity or any information about a possible suspect.

news.title: Atlanta man killed in July 4 shooting in Vidalia, GBI says
news.summary: Officers with the Vidalia Police Department arrived to find the victim lying in the roadway.

news.title: 16-year-old found dead days after Fourth of July shooting, police say
news.summary: Atlanta Police said they believe the 16-year-old found dead is the third victim of a shooting where two others were injured.
